Friday Harbor周五港
№ 005 Wednesday, April 29, 2026 2026年4月29日星期三 Seattle, WA · 47.6° N, 122.3° W 西雅图 · 北纬 47.6°，西经 122.3°

When the Model Draws Seattle 当模型来画西雅图

Asked to draw all 90 Seattle neighborhood boundaries one by one, Claude returned 90 real polygons — vertices following arterials, freeways, shorelines. Where adjacent neighborhoods' edges meet, the model's mental adjacency is correct. Where they don't, you can see what the model doesn't actually know. 请 Claude 把西雅图 90 个街区的边界一个一个画出来——它返回了 90 个真实多边形，顶点沿着主干道、高速、湖岸线走。相邻街区的边界对齐的地方，是模型记对了的部分；对不上的地方，是模型其实并不知道的那部分。

The notebook札记

The exercise here is the simplest version of the question. Take the City of Seattle's official list of 90 named neighborhoods. Hand the whole list to Claude (Opus 4.7) as a single task: draw all 90 boundaries, with vertices that follow what you actually believe the edge of each neighborhood follows — an arterial, a freeway, a shoreline, a ridge. Return one GeoJSON file with all of them. No external lookup. Render the result on the same projection and scale as the city's data, with the city's silhouette underneath.

The right panel is what came back. The polygons have shape — vertices placed where the model thinks the edge should turn. Pike-Pine's diagonal shows up. The Duwamish gets a notch. The Beacon Hill triplet shares its long N–S spine. The Ballard sub-neighborhoods tile across a single rectangle of north-of-the-canal city. The Rainier Valley chain — Mt Baker, Genesee, Columbia City, Brighton, Dunlap, Holly Park, Rainier Beach, Rainier View — runs as a single column down the eastern half of South Seattle. This is no longer a checklist with bounding boxes. It is the model attempting to render the city.

What it gets right and what it doesn't is patterned. Green Lake lands 36 m off — Green Lake is a small ring around a small lake, and the model has a lot of text about it. Portage Bay, Interbay, Pike Place, and the International District all land within 200 m. These are neighborhoods whose names are tied to legible features. The misses are larger and patterned the other way. Genesee — a small Rainier Valley neighborhood with almost no English-language internet presence — lands 7.1 km from where it is. South Beacon Hill is 2.8 km off. Pinehurst, Olympic Hills, North Beach–Blue Ridge — all in the far north strip, all over 1.5 km away from where they actually sit. Median drift across all 90: 650 m. Mean: 789 m.

The visual evidence is even stronger than the numbers. Look along the east shoreline: Madrona, Madison Park, Leschi, Mt Baker, Seward Park, Rainier Beach all spill east into Lake Washington. The model knows these neighborhoods touch the lake but cannot reproduce the actual coastline, so its polygons cross water. Look at Magnolia: the model remembers three sub-neighborhoods (Briarcliff, Lawton Park, Southeast Magnolia) and three rectangles, but cannot recover the peninsula's actual shape, so its three pieces overshoot into Puget Sound. Look at the joins between Capitol Hill, the Central District, and Madrona: gaps where the model didn't keep track of which streets divide them. Each of those failures is the model showing you what it doesn't know.

This is therefore a small anti-map of the kind the Friday Harbor project argues for. It does not show the city. It shows the shape of attention that produced the model. The places that get drawn well are the places the English-language internet has written about — landmarks, tourist sites, gentrification stories, real-estate beats. The places that get drawn badly are the rest.

这一题问得很直接：拿西雅图市政府公布的 90 个标准命名街区列表，作为一个完整任务交给 Claude（Opus 4.7）——请它把全部 90 条边界画出来，顶点要落在它认为该街区边界实际所在的地方： 一条主干道、一段高速、一条湖岸、一道山脊。返回一个 GeoJSON 文件，里面是全部 90 个。 不允许查阅任何外部资料。把结果用同一个投影和比例尺放回去，把市政府的西雅图轮廓垫在底下作参照。

右图就是模型交出来的答卷。这一次，多边形是有形状的—— 顶点放在了模型认为「边界该转折」的地方。Pike-Pine 的斜线出现了， Duwamish 河有了一个缺口，三个 Beacon Hill 子街区共享了那条南北向的脊背， Ballard 内部的几个子街区拼成了运河以北那块矩形城区， Rainier Valley 的链条——Mt Baker、Genesee、Columbia City、Brighton、Dunlap、Holly Park、Rainier Beach、Rainier View—— 从北到南串成了南西雅图东半部的一列。这不再是「清单加外接矩形」，这是模型在真的尝试画一座城市。

它画对的和画不对的，分布是有规律的。Green Lake 的偏差只有 36 米—— Green Lake 是围着一个小湖的一圈，模型读到过它的文本极多。 Portage Bay、Interbay、Pike Place、International District 也都在 200 米以内。 这些街区的名字直接对应可识别的地理特征。偏得最离谱的那几例方向反过来： Genesee——Rainier Valley 内一个英文互联网上几乎没人写过的小街区——偏离了 7.1 公里； South Beacon Hill 偏 2.8 公里；Pinehurst、Olympic Hills、North Beach–Blue Ridge 都在最北边那条带上， 也都偏 1.5 公里以上。全部 90 个的中位偏移：650 米，均值 789 米。

但视觉上的证据比数字还要直接。沿着东岸看：Madrona、Madison Park、Leschi、Mt Baker、Seward Park、Rainier Beach 全都向东突进了华盛顿湖。模型知道这些街区临湖，但画不出真正的湖岸线，所以多边形直接踏进水里。 看 Magnolia：模型记住了三个子街区（Briarcliff、Lawton Park、Southeast Magnolia）， 但记不出半岛的真实形状，于是三个矩形都越过悬崖突进了普吉特海湾。 再看 Capitol Hill、Central District、Madrona 三者交界的地方： 出现了一些缝隙——模型没记住到底是哪几条街把它们分开的。 每一处这样的失败，都是模型在直接告诉你它不知道什么。

所以这是 Friday Harbor 脉络所主张的那种「反图」（anti-map）——它呈现的不是城市， 而是生产这个模型的那份注意力的形状。被画好的街区，是英文互联网写过最多的那些—— 地标、旅游点、士绅化新闻、房产报道。被画坏的街区，是其余那些。

The provenance出处

  • Real boundaries: City of Seattle Neighborhood Map Atlas via the seattleio/seattle-boundaries-data repository, filtered to city == "Seattle"; coordinates rounded to 4 decimal places (~11 m precision).
  • AI boundaries: single task issued to Claude Opus 4.7 within this writing session — "draw all 90 Seattle neighborhood boundaries, vertices following streets, freeways, shorelines, ridges; return one GeoJSON file." No external lookups. The returned polygons are stored verbatim — not reshaped, not snapped, not cleaned. The model's output is the data. File: seattle-neighborhoods-claude-shaped.geojson.
  • Both layers projected with d3-geo's Albers projection, parallels at 47.5° and 47.75°, centred on Seattle.
  • Centroid drift figure computed locally as the median Haversine distance between the centroid of each Claude polygon and the centroid of the same-named real polygon (35 pairs).
  • Source map & build script: src/pages/friday-harbor/2026-04-29-when-the-model-draws-seattle.astro; data files in public/data/seattle-neighborhoods-real.geojson and seattle-neighborhoods-claude.geojson.
  • 真实边界：西雅图市《Neighborhood Map Atlas》，经 seattleio/seattle-boundaries-data 仓库加载，筛选 city == "Seattle"；坐标保留 4 位小数（约 11 m 精度）。
  • AI 边界：在本次写作会话中，向 Claude Opus 4.7 提交一个完整任务——「请把 90 个西雅图街区边界都画出来，顶点沿主干道、高速、湖岸、山脊走，返回一个 GeoJSON 文件」。禁止查阅外部资料。返回的多边形原样保存——未做整形、未对齐网格、未清洗。模型输出本身就是数据。文件：seattle-neighborhoods-claude-shaped.geojson。
  • 两层数据均用 d3-geo 的 Albers 投影渲染，标准纬线 47.5°、47.75°，中心点设在西雅图。
  • 质心偏移：本地计算，每对同名街区（共 35 对）的多边形质心间的 Haversine 距离，取其中位数。
  • 源码与构建脚本：src/pages/friday-harbor/2026-04-29-when-the-model-draws-seattle.astro；数据文件：public/data/seattle-neighborhoods-real.geojson 与 seattle-neighborhoods-claude.geojson。

University of Washington.

华盛顿大学。
